description: Upgrade profile modeling, short-term working memory governance, retrieval rerank quality, and memory lifecycle cleanup so the agent memory system becomes more stable, explainable, and production-ready.

userStories.title: Expand User Profile Taxonomy and Preserve Preference Timeline
userStories.description: As a product maintainer, I want profile extraction to support richer preference types with confidence decay and preference history so cross-session personalization is more accurate and traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: UserProfile extraction supports preference categories beyond language, including framework, domain, output format, and tone
Profile matching uses an effective confidence that decays over time instead of relying only on the raw stored confidence
New preferences do not blindly overwrite older ones; historical preference facts remain traceable via status or timeline semantics
Frontend profile views remain compatible and expose enough metadata to distinguish active preference vs historical preference
Add or update focused backend tests for extraction, decay scoring, and timeline/history behavior

userStories.title: Add Working Memory Compression and Disposable Intermediate Results
userStories.description: As a runtime maintainer, I want completed execution steps to write compressed summaries into working memory while allowing raw intermediate outputs to be discarded so context stays concise during longer runs.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime step completion writes a compact summary into working_memory instead of only preserving raw intermediate text
Intermediate results can be marked as discardable or omitted from future context assembly after the summary is captured
ContextBuilder and runtime context payloads expose the updated working-memory behavior without breaking existing consumers
The console and task detail views remain compatible with the new summarized working-memory representation
Add or update focused backend tests for working-memory summarization, trimming, and discardable output behavior

Add or update focused backend tests for working-memory summarization, trimming, and discardable output behavior

userStories.title: Introduce Professional Rerank Integration with Safe Fallback
userStories.description: As a RAG maintainer, I want retrieval to support a dedicated rerank stage with a fallback path so recall quality improves without sacrificing local reliability.
acceptanceCriteria: Recall flow separates candidate generation from rerank instead of relying only on fixed manual scoring
A rerank provider abstraction exists and can fall back to the current heuristic scoring when credentials or provider support are unavailable
Retrieval responses still expose score, reason, and channel metadata after rerank is introduced
The implementation does not regress current manual-ingestion or parent-document recall behavior
Add or update focused backend tests for rerank ordering, fallback mode, and metadata stability

userStories.title: Add Memory Expiration and Cleanup Governance
userStories.description: As a platform maintainer, I want long-term memories and profile facts to support staleness, archival, and cleanup rules so memory quality does not degrade over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Long-term memories and relevant profile facts support richer lifecycle states such as active, stale, archived, or deleted
A cleanup policy can identify low-value or superseded memories without immediately hard-deleting useful records
Runtime and management APIs remain compatible while exposing enough lifecycle metadata for UI or future automation consumers
Memory listing and retrieval logic handle stale or archived records intentionally instead of treating every record as equally current
Add or update focused backend tests for cleanup policy, lifecycle transitions, and retrieval filtering
